firmware.title: OnePlus 8 OxygenOS 11.1.3.IN68CE is available
firmware.description:
New version: OxygenOS 11.1.3.IN68CE

All information on your phone will be saved. Upon completion, your phone will reboot.

The software update includes the following: System

• Android security patch upgraded to Sept. 2021 If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 2AM and 4AM starting September 22th, 2021. This will not consume your data. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.
